description: This live playground is genuinely correct by default, so it is NOT the eval ground truth. A correct audit of it reports ZERO seeded modern-UX findings (the false-positive / regression guard for the product). The seeded-issue ground truth (the nine findings F-001..F-009 that prove auditor recall) is frozen in eval/fixtures/seeded-issues/expected-findings.json.
falsePositiveCheck: Audit http://localhost:8080 (this playground). The audit must report zero seeded modern-UX findings: dark mode (light-dark()), reduced motion (gated animation), responsive layout (fluid max-width), focus visibility (:focus-visible), layout shift (reserved min-height), and container queries (@container) are all already correct here, and index.html carries a color-scheme meta, a meta description, and a favicon.
